channel.title: Environmental Systems Research Institute, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Environmental Systems Research Institute, Inc. (esri).

image.title: Environmental Systems Research Institute, Inc. — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-13019 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Missing Authentication
item.description: Esri Portal for ArcGIS versions 12.1 and earlier on Windows, Linux and Kubernetes have a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to access an unprotected API.

item.title: CVE-2026-13020 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Weak Password Recovery Mechanism in Portal for ArcGIS
item.description: A Weak Password Recovery Mechanism for Forgotten Password exists in Esri Portal for ArcGIS versions 12.1 and earlier on Windows, Linux and Kubernetes. A remote, unauthorized attacker may assume ownership of a user’s account by manipulating this mecha…

item.title: CVE-2026-9181 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Directory Traversal in ArcGIS Server
item.description: ArcGIS Server contains a directory traversal vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker could exploit this issue by sending crafted path parameters. Successful exploitation could allow access to sensitive files on the system. This issue impacts all v…

item.title: CVE-2026-9182 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unvalidated File Upload vulnerability in ArcGIS Server.
item.description: ArcGIS Server contains an unrestricted file upload vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker could exploit this issue by uploading a crafted file to the affected endpoint. Successful exploitation could allow arbitrary file upload.

item.title: CVE-2026-2813 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unvalidated Redirect in ArcGIS Server
item.description: ArcGIS Server contains an input validation weakness in the login redirection workflow. An Authenticated attacker could exploit this issue by sending a specially crafted request, Successful exploitation may result in the application redirecting the br…

item.title: CVE-2026-2812 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Improper Authentication issue in ArcGIS Server
item.description: ArcGIS Server contains an improper authentication vulnerability in an undocumented administrative endpoint. An unauthenticated attacker could exploit this issue by sending a crafted request to the endpoint. Successful exploitation may result in disru…

item.title: CVE-2026-33519 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect privilege assignment in Portal for ArcGIS
item.description: An incorrect authorization vulnerability exists in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4, 11.5 and 12.0 on Windows, Linux and Kubernetes that did not correctly check permissions assigned to developer credentials.

item.title: CVE-2026-33518 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Incorrect privilege assignment in Portal for ArcGIS
item.description: An incorrect privilege assignment vulnerability exists in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.5 in Windows and Linux that allows highly privileged users to create developer credentials that may grant more privileges than expected.

item.title: CVE-2026-1446 · 5 MEDIUM — XSS issue is Esri ArcGIS Pro versions 3.6.0 and earlier
item.description: There is a Cross‑Site Scripting (XSS) issue in Esri ArcGIS Pro versions 3.6.0 and earlier. ArcGIS Pro is a desktop application, and exploitation is limited to local users interacting with the application; no privileged role or elevated permissions ar…

item.title: CVE-2025-67711 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected XSS vulnerability in ArcGIS Server.
item.description: There is a stored cross site scripting issue in Esri ArcGIS Server 11.4 and earlier on Windows and Linux that in some configurations allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to store files that contain malicious code that may execute in the context o…

item.title: CVE-2025-67710 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS vulnerability in ArcGIS Server
item.description: There is a stored cross site scripting issue in Esri ArcGIS Server 11.4 and earlier on Windows and Linux that in some configurations allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to store files that contain malicious code that may execute in the context o…

item.title: CVE-2025-67709 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — There is a cross site scripting issue in ArcGIS Server.
item.description: There is a stored cross site scripting issue in Esri ArcGIS Server 11.4 and earlier on Windows and Linux that in some configurations allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to store files that contain malicious code that may execute in the context o…

item.title: CVE-2025-67708 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in ArcGIS Server.
item.description: There is a stored cross site scripting issue in Esri ArcGIS Server 11.4 and earlier on Windows and Linux that in some configurations allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to store files that contain malicious code that may execute in the context o…

item.title: CVE-2025-67707 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unvalidated File Upload vulnerability in ArcGIS Server.
item.description: ArcGIS Server versions 11.5 and earlier on Windows and Linux do not sufficiently validate uploaded files, enabling a remote unauthenticated attacker to upload arbitrary files to the server’s designated upload directories. However, the server’s archit…

item.title: CVE-2025-67706 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unvalidated File Upload vulnerability in ArcGIS Server.
item.description: ArcGIS Server versions 11.5 and earlier on Windows and Linux do not sufficiently validate uploaded files, enabling a remote unauthenticated attacker to upload arbitrary files to the server’s designated upload directories. However, the server’s archit…

item.title: CVE-2025-67705 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected XSS vulnerability in ArcGIS Server.
item.description: There is a stored cross site scripting issue in Esri ArcGIS Server 11.4 and earlier on Windows and Linux that in some configurations allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to store files that contain malicious code that may execute in the context o…

item.title: CVE-2025-67704 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS vulnerability in ArcGIS Server.
item.description: There is a stored cross site scripting issue in Esri ArcGIS Server 11.4 and earlier on Windows and Linux that in some configurations allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to store files that contain malicious code that may execute in the context o…

item.title: CVE-2025-67703 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS vulnerability in ArcGIS Server.
item.description: There is a stored cross site scripting issue in Esri ArcGIS Server 11.4 and earlier on Windows and Linux that in some configurations allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to store files that contain malicious code that may execute in the context o…

item.title: CVE-2025-67712 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ 👻 — HTML injection issue in ArcGIS Web App Builder
item.description: There is an HTML injection issue in Esri ArcGIS Web AppBuilder developer edition versions prior to 2.30 that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to potentially entice a user to click a link that causes arbitrary HTML to render in a victim's bro…

item.title: CVE-2025-57870 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BUG-000179884 - There is a security vulnerability in ArcGIS Server Feature Services.
item.description: A SQL Injection vulnerability exists in Esri ArcGIS Server versions 11.3, 11.4 and 11.5 on Windows, Linux and Kubernetes. This vulnerability allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary SQL commands via a specific ArcGIS Feature Ser…

item.title: CVE-2025-57871 · 4.8 MEDIUM — BUG-000174020 - Reflected XSS vulnerability identified in Portal for ArcGIS. (11.3, 11.1, 10.9.1)
item.description: There is a reflected cross site scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and below that may allow a remote authenticated attacker with administrative access to supply a crafted string which would execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the…

item.title: CVE-2025-57872 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — BUG-000174150 - Unvalidated redirect in Portal for ArcGIS.
item.description: There is an unvalidated redirect vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and below that may allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to craft a URL that could redirect a victim to an arbitrary website, simplifying phishing attacks.

item.title: CVE-2025-57873 · 4.8 MEDIUM — BUG-000175222 - Reflected XSS vulnerability in Portal for ArcGIS.
item.description: There is a reflected cross site scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and below that may allow a remote authenticated attacker with administrative access to supply a crafted string which would execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the…

item.title: CVE-2025-57874 · 4.8 MEDIUM — BUG-000161627 - Reflected XSS vulnerability in Portal for ArcGIS. (11.3, 11.1, 10.9.1)
item.description: There is a reflected cross site scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and below that may allow a remote authenticated attacker with administrative access to supply a crafted string which would execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the…

item.title: CVE-2025-57875 · 4.8 MEDIUM — BUG-000164122 - Reflected XSS vulnerability in Portal for ArcGIS.
item.description: There is a reflected cross site scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and below that may allow a remote authenticated attacker with administrative access to supply a crafted string which would execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the…

item.title: CVE-2025-57877 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Reflected XSS vulnerability in Portal for ArcGIS.
item.description: There is a reflected cross site scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and below that may allow a remote authenticated attacker with administrative access to supply a crafted string which would execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the…

item.title: CVE-2025-57878 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — BUG-000174149 - The Portal for ArcGIS has an unvalidated redirect.
item.description: There is an unvalidated redirect vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and below that may allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to craft a URL that could redirect a victim to an arbitrary website, simplifying phishing attacks.

item.title: CVE-2025-57879 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — BUG-000171009 - URL manipulation vulnerability in Portal for ArcGIS.
item.description: There is an unvalidated redirect vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and below that may allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to craft a URL that could redirect a victim to an arbitrary website, simplifying phishing attacks.

item.title: CVE-2025-57876 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Stored XSS vulnerability in Portal for ArcGIS
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and below that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to inject malicious a file with an embedded xss script which when loaded could potentially execute arbitrary…

item.title: CVE-2025-55107 · 4.8 MEDIUM — BUG-000177335 ArcGIS Enterprise Sites has a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability.
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS Enterprise Sites versions 10.9.1 – 11.4 that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to inject malicious a file with an embedded xss script which when loaded could pote…

item.title: CVE-2025-55106 · 4.8 MEDIUM — BUG-000173171 ArcGIS Enterprise Sites has a Cross-site Scripting vulnerability.
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS Enterprise Sites versions 10.9.1 – 11.4 that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to inject malicious a file with an embedded xss script which when loaded could pote…

item.title: CVE-2025-55105 · 4.8 MEDIUM — BUG-000177336 - ArcGIS Enterprise Sites has a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability.
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS Enterprise Sites versions 10.9.1 – 11.4 that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to inject malicious a file with an embedded xss script which when loaded could pote…

item.title: CVE-2025-55104 · 4.8 MEDIUM — BUG-000173918 - ArcGIS Enterprise Sites has a security vulnerability.
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability exists ArcGIS HUB and ArcGIS Enterprise Sites which allows an authenticated user with the ability to create or edit a site to add and store an XSS payload. If this stored XSS payload is triggered by a…

item.title: CVE-2025-55103 · 4.8 MEDIUM — BUG-000177333 - ArcGIS Enterprise Sites has a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability.
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in Esri Portal for ArcGIS Enterprise Sites versions 10.9.1 – 11.4 that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to inject malicious a file with an embedded xss script which when loaded could pote…

item.title: CVE-2025-4967 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Server Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Portal for ArcGIS
item.description: Esri Portal for ArcGIS 11.4 and prior allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to bypass the Portal’s SSRF protections.

item.title: CVE-2025-2538 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BUG-000174336
item.description: A hardcoded credential vulnerability exists in a specific deployment pattern for Esri Portal for ArcGIS versions 11.4 and below that may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to gain administrative access to the system.

item.title: CVE-2024-51966 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Directory traversal vulnerability in ArcGIS Server
item.description: There is a path traversal vulnerability in ESRI ArcGIS Server versions 11.3 and below. Successful exploitation may allow a remote authenticated attacker with admin privileges to traverse the file system to access files outside of the intended directo…

item.title: CVE-2024-51963 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in ArcGIS Server Manager
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in ArcGIS Server for versions 11.3 and follow that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to create a stored crafted link which when clicked could potentially execute arbitrary JavaScript code…

item.title: CVE-2024-51962 · 8.7 HIGH — SQL injection vulnerability in ArcGIS Server
item.description: A SQL injection vulnerability in ArcGIS Server allows an EDIT operation to modify column properties in a manner that could lead to SQL injection when performed by a remote authenticated user requiring elevated, non‑administrative privileges. Exploita…

item.title: CVE-2024-51961 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Local file inclusion (LFI) vulnerability in ArcGIS Server
item.description: There is a local file inclusion vulnerability in ArcGIS Server 11.3 and below that may allow a remote, unauthenticated attacker to craft a URL that could potentially disclose sensitive configuration information by reading internal files from the remo…

item.title: CVE-2024-51960 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in ArcGIS Server Administrator Directory
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in ArcGIS Server for versions 11.3 and below that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to create a stored crafted link which when clicked could potentially execute arbitrary JavaScript code i…

item.title: CVE-2024-51959 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Stored XSS issue in Server Admin API
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in ArcGIS Server for versions 11.3 and below that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to create a stored crafted link which when clicked could potentially execute arbitrary JavaScript code i…

item.title: CVE-2024-51958 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Directory traversal vulnerability in the admin api for service thumbnails
item.description: There is a path traversal vulnerability in ESRI ArcGIS Server versions 11.3 and below. Successful exploitation may allow a remote authenticated attacker with admin privileges to traverse the file system to access files outside of the intended directo…

item.title: CVE-2024-51957 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Stored XSS vulnerability in ArcGIS Rest Services Directory
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in ArcGIS Server for versions 11.3 and below that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to create a stored crafted link which when clicked could potentially execute arbitrary JavaScript code i…

item.title: CVE-2024-51956 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Stored XSS vulnerability in ArcGIS Server Administrator Directory
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in ArcGIS Server for versions 11.3 and below that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to create a stored crafted link which when clicked could potentially execute arbitrary JavaScript code i…

item.title: CVE-2024-51954 · 8.5 HIGH — Unauthorized access to secure services in ArcGIS Server
item.description: There is an improper access control issue in ArcGIS Server versions 11.3 and below on Windows and Linux which, under unique circumstances, could allow a remote, low‑privileged authenticated attacker to access secure services published to a standalone…

item.title: CVE-2024-51953 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in ArcGIS Server Rest services
item.description: There is a stored Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in ArcGIS Server for versions 11.3 and below that may allow a remote, authenticated attacker to create a stored crafted link which when clicked could potentially execute arbitrary JavaScript code i…
